name: large fireplace
hints: There is a dusty idol and a closed flue here. Both are important.
GET IDOL and OPEN FLUE. The idol needs to be cleaned (dusted) to make it glow. The flue opens the chimney.
DUST IDOL or CLEAN IDOL to make it glow brightly - needed for the final ritual. OPEN FLUE then GO FLUE to climb the chimney.
GET IDOL, DUST IDOL (makes it glow - needed for counter-spell). OPEN FLUE, GO FLUE to climb chimney. SOUTH returns to ballroom.

effects: Message: I hear strange sounds, as if someone were moaning.

notes: Inside the fireplace with the dusty idol (dust it to make it glow - essential for the final ritual) and a closed flue (open it to access the chimney). LISTEN reveals faint moaning from above. SOUTH returns to ballroom.
